Hi, I'm Doris 👋

@hustlewithdoris · Digital Marketer & Online Entrepreneur

I show and teach people how to earn income online through digital products, marketing and content creation. I've spent years in this space helping people find their first income online — and I've seen what works and what doesn't.

And here's the truth — AI has completely changed the game. What used to take weeks now takes hours. What used to require expensive tools and a big team? You can now do it alone, on your phone, in one sitting.

💡 Me and the people seeing results found a system that turns your ideas into income, your knowledge into products, and your time spent online into real money. Not theory. Not "someday." Now.

Your phone is literally an ATM waiting to be activated. The knowledge you already have — things people ask you about, skills you've built, experiences you've lived through — people are paying good money to learn that.

And our coach and mentor, Passive Income Anna, has generated over ₦200 million naira in just the past few months using this exact system. The students doing this aren't lucky — they have a blueprint. This is that blueprint.

The AI Money Printer Playbook shows you step by step how to take what you already know, let AI help you package it beautifully, and start getting paid — even if you've never sold anything in your life.

The Solution

Meet the
AI Money Printer Playbook

A digital product is something you create once — an ebook, a guide, a template, a mini-course — and sell over and over again. No shipping. No inventory. Pure profit, straight to your account.

And with AI tools like ChatGPT, you don't even have to create it yourself. The AI does 90% of the work — writing, designing, scripting, even helping you sell it. Your job? Guide the process and collect the money.

Got Questions?

We've Got Answers.

I don't have a laptop — can I still do this? ▼
Yes, 100%. Module 4 is specifically dedicated to designing and building your entire product using just your smartphone. No laptop required, no expensive tools, nothing extra needed.
I have zero experience. Is this really for beginners? ▼
Absolutely. This playbook was built for people who have never sold anything online before. Every module is written in plain language with step-by-step instructions. If you can follow a recipe, you can follow this.
What if I don't have a big following or audience? ▼
You don't need one. Module 7 covers exactly how to launch and make sales without a large audience. Immanuella Chidinma made ₦90,000 in 24 hours. She didn't have a massive following — she had the right system.
How quickly will I get access after payment? ▼
Instantly. As soon as your payment is confirmed, you'll receive access to the full playbook and your bonus prompts directly to your email. You could literally be inside the course within the next few minutes.
What kind of digital product will I create? ▼
It could be an ebook, a guide, a template, a mini-course, a checklist — anything you can teach or share that people will pay for. Module 2 helps you figure out the exact product idea that fits YOU specifically.
Is ₦19,000 really worth it? ▼
One sale of your digital product will give you that ₦19,000 back immediately. One. Sale. After that everything is profit. The real question is — can you afford not to invest in a system that could change your financial story?
I've bought courses before and nothing worked. Why is this different? ▼
Most courses give you information. This gives you a system with AI doing 90% of the work for you. You're not just learning — you're executing step by step with tools that build the product alongside you. The results speak for themselves.
